description: PROP-023 test (step1-prepare-save-request.test.ts lines 277-295) is tautological. It asserts result.value.kind === 'empty-discarded' and result.value.kind !== 'validated', which is the exact same assertion already made in the PROP-003 test. The proof obligation for PROP-023 is to verify that EditingSessionState does NOT transition to 'saving', but the test makes no assertion about state whatsoever. It tests return value shape, not state non-transition.
